pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-bom from 8.73.2 to 8.74.0
pull_request.body:
Bumps [org.openrewrite:rewrite-bom](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) from 8.73.2 to 8.74.0.
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-bom's releases.

8.74.0

What's Changed

  • Upgrade rewrite-kotlin to Kotlin 2 compiler (K2) by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6766
  • Autodetect text block indent by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6768
  • Restore recipe hierarchy rows in SourcesFileResults by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6764
  • Fall back to uv lock when no lock file exists for pyproject.toml by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6769
  • ChangeImport: rewrite qualified references when old_name is specified by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6760
  • JavaScript: Write .npmrc file before install by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6417
  • Parse more checkstyle rules into OpenRewrite styles. by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6761
  • Use resolved version of managed dependency in ResolvedPom's managed dependencies by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#6776
  • Fix DeclarativeRecipe descriptor leaking PreconditionBellwether by @​pstreef in openrewrite/rewrite#6774
  • Restore TypeTable support for Kotlin K2 by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6779
  • Add Variable type attribution for Python identifiers by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6772
  • Fix Java 21 parser dropping var in record pattern binding variables by @​cuioss-oliver in openrewrite/rewrite#6781
  • Add prefix to the block after resolutionStrategy block when non existing by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6784
  • Include declarative recipe preconditions in recipe descriptors by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6777
  • Python: Replace LSP hover with ty-types structured descriptors by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6782
  • Filter duplicate generated files in ScanningRecipe.generate() by @​pstreef in openrewrite/rewrite#6778
  • Fix Python RPC server crash on Windows due to hardcoded /tmp log path by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6787
  • Fix resolution of dated snapshots as input by @​shanman190 in openrewrite/rewrite#6788
  • Annotation attribute non jvm class misses import by @​BoykoAlex in openrewrite/rewrite#6786
  • Move all kotlinx recipes to rewrite-migrate-kotlin by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6791
  • Fix ChangeManagedDependencyGroupIdAndArtifactId overwriting artifactId with glob pattern by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6783
  • Python: Add type attribution tests and fix method declaration/type hint types by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6794
  • Python: Add parameter field_type attribution and call-site type arguments by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6795
  • Fix exponential overcounting in composite recipe listings by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6796
  • Python: Add type attribution tests, use moduleName for module-qualified FQNs, and fix RemoveImport shadowing by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6798
  • Update expected jackson-jakarta-rs-json-provider version in test by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6801
  • Handle local version variables in UpgradePluginVersion for kotlin plugins by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6746
  • Use flexible version assertions in ChangeDependencyGroupIdAndArtifactId tests by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6799
  • Add Kotlin script template support for Gradle KTS by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6792
  • Add type attribution for Gradle plugin DSL in KTS files by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6804
  • DeleteProperty: preserve inline comments when deleting entries by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6797
  • Preserve old exclusions and add sibling for new coordinates on dependency change by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6800

New Contributors

  • @​cuioss-oliver made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite#6781

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.73.2...v8.74.0

Commits
  • 0d799f7 Python: Increase recursion limit for deeply nested LST nodes (#6792)
  • 75019a9 Preserve old exclusions and add sibling for new coordinates on dependency cha...
  • afc5028 DeleteProperty: preserve inline comments when deleting entries (#6797)
  • 5d457b1 Python: Handle specialForm type descriptors from ty-types (#6798)
  • 0880a2a Python: Map typeVar descriptors to GenericTypeVariable with variance and uppe...
  • 2cf6fd5 Update Gradle wrapper to 9.3.1
  • 0aaced9 Add instance name suffix method to UpdateGradleWrapper
  • 5e680f8 Add type attribution for Gradle plugin DSL in KTS files (#6804)
  • 2fda680 Add Kotlin script template support for Gradle KTS (#6792)
  • d4392fc Use flexible version assertions in ChangeDependencyGroupIdAndArtifactId tests...
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
